Academics

The primary objective of the Institute is to provide Quality Education to students by offering a wide range of Academic & Practical facilities.

Placements

Some of AIMSCS's top recruiters include TCS, Goldman Sachs, Quadrant, Servcrust, Decan AI, Joly AI , Polymath, CRRAO AIMSCS, and many more.

Student Life

Our Students have a range of talents, interests, and needs, and we are committed to providing the opportunities that promote their growth.

About AIMSCS

The Institute is named after the living legend and the most celebrated statistician of our time, Padma Vibushan Prof. C. R. Rao, FRS, who established the institute to promote research from grassroots levels and strengthen the Indian research community. As a result of his zeal and passion, we are striving to build an institute of excellence, which promotes research in mathematics and statistics.

Read More

Important Dates

Admission process started for the AY 2026-2027 through Online Applications and last date for application will be announced in due course

CR RAO AIMSCS PRESTIGIOUS INSTITUTION

Kickstart your Journey toward Excellence in Computer Engineering - Data Science by starting your association with one of India's most Prestigious Institutions

ENQUIRE NOW

To inquire about the admission process, kindly provide us with your details through the form below. Our faculty will promptly respond to your query and guide you through the necessary steps for enrollment.

Admission to CR Rao AIMSCS - BTech Program

  • Online applications are invited for admissions into AICTE-approved Self-Finance B.Tech- Computer Science & Engg. (Data Science) program
  • This Program is in collaboration with JNTUH for 10+2 qualified students for the academic year 2023-24.
  • Admissions will be based on JEE (Mains) 2023 / TS EAMCET 2023 Ranks.

WHAT THE PARENTS SAY

Building a legacy of excellence that parents are proud to be a part of.

The College offers a comprehensive learning experience that surpasses expectations. The infrastructure is top-notch & the faculty are committed to providing an excellent learning experience.

At CR RAO AIMSCS, students have the opportunity to receive a B.Tech degree from a top-notch institution with exceptional faculty standards. The experience is truly unparalleled.

  • ML Babu

What sets the faculty at this college apart is their willingness to interact with students and consider our suggestions to enhance the learning experience. This level of dedication is rare to find.

  • Sheik Abdul

CR Rao AIMSCS

The Institute is named after the living legend and the most celebrated statistician of our time, Padma Vibushan Prof. C. R. Rao, FRS, who established the institute to promote research from grassroots levels and strengthen the Indian research community. As a result of his zeal and passion, we are striving to build an institute of excellence, which promotes research in mathematics and statistics.
